author: TonyMontana
content:
**Welcome To Module 2: The Basics of Trading**

In this module we will go over everything you need to know as a beginner trader.

This will be focused on the basics of trading, to ensure everyone is up to date: beginner to pro!

**Workshop 2 Content:** 👇


Lesson 1 - **Basics of Trading**

Lesson 2 - **Trading Terminology**

Lesson 3 - **Different Types of Traders**

Lesson 4 - **Fundamentals of The Market**

**Watch Module 2 Here:** 👇
